# User Request — SpecRelay Task 9002-dogfood-scenario-b

Spec source: docs/sdd/9002-dogfood-scenario-b/spec.md

# Dogfood Scenario B — reviewer requests changes, then accepts round 2

Append a line to CHANGELOG-FIXTURE.txt at the repository root. This is a
deliberately trivial, bounded, safe fixture spec used only to dogfood
SpecRelay's request-changes/requeue/round-2 rework lifecycle (SDD 0085
dogfood scenario B) inside an isolated harness — it is not real product work.
